## Summary

## Task / Spec Link

## Checklist

- [ ] Task, issue, AEP, or spec section referenced
- [ ] Scope limited to this change
- [ ] Spec text updated when normative behavior changes
- [ ] Schemas updated when object shape changes
- [ ] Examples or invalid cases updated
- [ ] Registry entries updated when identifiers change
- [ ] Security model, ADRs, or glossary updated when behavior or terminology changes
- [ ] `make validate` passes
- [ ] `make phase0` passes when readiness evidence is affected
- [ ] License compatibility checked for any new dependency or copied material
- [ ] No secrets, real keys, real mandates, private receipts, or owner data included
- [ ] Documentation remains vendor-neutral and implementation-neutral

## Protocol Invariants

- [ ] Owner approval remains the root of exposure and action publication
- [ ] Verification, parsing, and policy failures fail closed
- [ ] Durable artifacts keep the canonical signing profile
- [ ] Risk floors, SIMULATE, idempotency, mandates, and receipts are not weakened
- [ ] Owner-deployed software does not add undeclared telemetry
